title: Heartcore Mode
description:
A Gamemode easier than Hardcore but harder than Survival. Ten Lives, lose a heart on death. Enjoy!

Icon was originally made in Icons8 but then altered by me.
body: This is th OFFICIAL and ORIGINAL Heartcore Datapack, made by myself: TomatoFacex1. I use this on my Main Survival world down in Youtube, so if you do enjoy the datapack or you think it's an interestign concept or even if you just like Minecraft Youtube, come check me out here: https://www.youtube.com/@TomatoFacex1
